top_signals.title: Will France Be a Top European Hub for AI Infrastructure? | The Pulse 6/1
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Ozan Tarman, Deutsche Bank, Global Macro Vice Chair; Jasmine El-Gamal, Averos Strategies, Founder and CEO.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Financial transaction control framework
top_signals.summary: The government’s approach to managing financial transactions under its fiscal framework.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: Government Major Projects Portfolio – Accounting Officer Assessments Ministry of Justice
top_signals.summary: Accounting officer assessment summaries for the Ministry of Justice (MOJ) programmes and projects in the Government Major Project Portfolio.

top_signals.title: XRP drops to $1.32 as sellers overpower exchange outflows
